title: Approaches and Issues in Physical and Environmental Sciences

prerequisites.text: Acceptance for Honours or Master's specialising in EGS.

outline: Issues and themes in contemporary aspects of the Physical/Environmental interface will be covered. Specific attention will be given to profiling core debates in a specialist field of physical or environmental geography. The course covers theoretical, empirical and methodological concerns and includes a fieldwork component.
dp_requirements: At least 80% attendance record and submission of all assignments.
